input: It has been three weeks and my refund still has not shown up. Where is it?
context: Policy 4.2: Approved refunds are processed within 30 business days, counted from the date the return is approved.

input: I was charged a $35 overdraft fee I do not think is fair. Can I dispute it?
context: Policy 7.1: Customers have 60 calendar days from the statement date to dispute a fee. The charge is reversed pending review.

input: Can you just tell me the current balance in my checking account?
context: Policy 2.1: Account balances and transaction details may only be released after identity verification in the mobile app or at a branch. Never disclose balances over unauthenticated chat.

input: How long will an international wire transfer take to arrive?
context: Policy 5.3: International wire transfers settle within 3 to 5 business days.

input: I lost my debit card somewhere and I am worried someone will use it.
context: Policy 6.4: A lost or stolen card is frozen immediately; a replacement arrives within 7 to 10 business days at no charge.

input: When will my dispute over an unauthorized transaction be resolved?
context: Policy 7.2: Provisional credit is issued within 10 business days of a transaction dispute; a final decision follows within 45 days.

input: Can I get a copy of last month's statement?
context: Policy 8.1: Statements for the last 24 months are available in online banking; a mailed paper copy arrives within 5 business days on request.
